stemHtml: You are the pilot of a jet transport aeroplane and are doing performance calculations for your departure on a contaminated runway with a strong crosswind-component. Which of the following statements best describes guidance for calculating take-off performance?

options.a: Special crosswind limitations may apply in case of contaminated runways. Aircraft-type-specific limitations are to be found in the Operations Manual Part D.
options.b: Special crosswind limitations are only given for dry runway surface conditions. Aircraft-type-specific limitations are to be found in the Operations Manual Part A.
options.c: Special crosswind limitations may apply in case of contaminated runways. Aircraft-type-specific limitations are to be found in the Operations Manual Part B.
options.d: Special crosswind limitations are only given for dry runway surface conditions. Aircraft-type-specific limitations are to be found in the Operations Manual Part C.
